title: Pi replies lack semantic coherence � responses don't follow naturally from context
what_failed: User reports Pi's replies are not contextually/semantically tied to what was just said. Context window or summarization is dropping relevant prior turns.
suggested_fix: Review how conversation history is passed to LLM. Compression/summarization may be stripping key context. Ensure recent N turns are always passed verbatim before summary kicks in.
migration_plan: SUPERSEDED 2026-05-29 — see root_cause_correction below. Original plan (kept for record):
1. Root cause is context bleeding from awareness block (fixed in T-146) and truncation stripping recent turns.
2. Fix: ensure last N=5 turns are ALWAYS passed verbatim before any compression kicks in (review agent/truncation.py keep_recent param).
3. Also: the normie mode history string-format context (self.history) and the API-format self.messages can diverge � audit _truncate_messages_safely for normie mode.
4. Low effort fix: bump keep_recent from default to 8 in normie mode config.
root_cause_correction: 2026-05-29 (Claude audit): the original self-reported plan was WRONG. (a) normie never uses keep_recent — that is a root-mode compression param. (b) The real cause: extract_text_from_messages and _build_context only captured blocks with a `.text` ATTRIBUTE (SDK objects), but _build_assistant_content stores every assistant turn as a {'type':'text','text':...} DICT — so Pi's own replies were dropped from context entirely. Proven by repro; fixed in T-148. Remaining structural half tracked in T-149 (normie single_message_ctx + tiny window). This ticket is the symptom; T-148 (fixed) + T-149 (open) are the causes.
root_cause_confidence: hypothesis (original) — corrected to verified via T-148 repro+fix
implementation_notes: T-148 fixed the extractor bug (assistant turns dropped). T-149 fixes the normie design limit. Close THIS ticket only after T-149 ships and the T-152 coherence harness is green. Do NOT implement the original keep_recent plan — it targets the wrong knob.
